raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need to output calendar for December 2120, previous month November 2120, next month January 2121. Use cal. Command: cal -m 2120? Actually cal 2120 12 gives December 2120. For previous month: cal 2120 11. For next month: cal 2121 1. Combine with cat? Use echo? We can use cal 2120 11; echo; cal 2120 12; echo; cal 2121 1. So single command: cal 2120 11; echo; cal 2120 12; echo; cal 2121 1.

So single command: cal 2120 11; echo; cal 2120 12; echo; cal 2121 1.
